name: recursive-specialization
description: Turn first-observation capability gaps and skill feedback into dogfooded expert candidates.

interface.shortDescription: Create and improve skills from first-use evidence.
interface.longDescription: A narrow Codex adapter for Recursive Harness Specialization. It records local evidence, creates or amends candidates immediately, and requires dogfood proof before canonical promotion.
interface.defaultPrompt: Capture this missing capability or skill improvement and dogfood the candidate.
